title: Site Health Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the site-health family — drift detection records, severity classification, repair tier descriptors, and audit trace fields produced by the Site Health enforcement layer. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §19, §19A.
